mapper.select: SELECT * FROM character_info ORDER BY rarity DESC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO character_info (name, rarity, element, weapon_type, description, image_url, hp, atk, def, crit, energy) VALUES (#{name}, #{rarity}, #{element}, #{weaponType}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{hp}, #{atk}, #{def}, #{crit}, #{energy})
